description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: product, demo, and integration. The product job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python, downloads Android Python builds, installs requirements, builds the product, and uploads the Maven repository. The demo job depends on product, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python, downloads the Maven repository, gets a keystore, and builds and uploads the APK. The integration job depends on product, runs on a matrix of OS and AGP versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python with extra versions, downloads the Maven repository, installs requirements, and runs tests.
